metadata.name: Manage REACH Compliance for New Product

description: A new chemical product is planned for sale in the EU. An EHS specialist must ensure all substances are registered under REACH regulations.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the formulation for the new product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the list of all chemical components.

nodes.task_description: For each component, check its registration status in the company's REACH database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that 3 of the 4 components are already registered, but one is not.

nodes.task_description: Flag the new product as 'Not for sale in EU' and notify the R&D team that the unregistered component must be registered or replaced.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the product's compliance status and sends a notification to the R&D manager.
